layout_note: Typed attachment table, transposed spreadsheet layout: one transaction per column (4 columns), attribute labels down the left (EIF; SP, DC, JT; Security Name; Ticker; Transaction; Amount of Transaction A-L + Spouse/DC; Type of Transaction; Capital Gain; Transaction Date). Selections are black-filled cells. The 'SP, DC, JT' row and the 'Transaction' row are continuous black bands across all four columns (no letters visible). EIF row has a black fill in column 4 only (York Credit Opportunities Fund). Amount fills: B (col 1), G (col 2), D (col 3), F (col 4). Type of Transaction: Purchase band spans cols 1-3; Sale fill in col 4. Capital Gain Exceeded $200 fill in col 4 only. Footer group label: 'MS Areco'.
free_text: Note: Dependent Child reporting was not applicable last year
